case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. GEMMA MUNAR et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MUNAR, GEMMA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-25-2013

DECLARATION OF REDUCED FILING FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED OCT-01-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MUNAR, GEMMA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $249.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MUNAR, GEMMA

DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNAR, GEMMA $2,787.30 PRINCIPAL, $159.53 INTEREST, $249.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,195.83, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
